body_transformation: Geodude's compact stone body now glows with a soft pastel pink and ivory white hue, its surface covered in delicate lavender crystalline patterns that shimmer like starlight. The rough, rocky texture transforms into smooth, velvety petals with subtle petal gold accents along its limbs and head. Its fist-like arms retain their rounded knuckles but now feature soft, translucent wing-like flaps at the wrists, while its four short legs end in tiny, delicate hoof pads that emit a faint silver glow. The once-stony head now bears a star-shaped marking on its forehead, with glowing orb-like eyes made of shimmering crystal.
signature_feature: Star-shaped forehead marking: luminous crystalline star with petal gold accents and soft silver glow.
